tasks.title: Create paper-guide.js rendering module
tasks.description: New module that renders paper recap cards in each chapter tab. Mirrors study-guide.js pattern: expandable cards, intuitive/technical toggle, status/relevance badges, localStorage checkboxes. Must expose renderPaperGuides() function called from app.js init.

tasks.title: Create paper-cards.css styles
tasks.description: CSS for paper cards: status badges (read=green, skimmed=yellow, queued=gray), relevance badges (core=accent, related=muted, context=dim), card layout matching concept cards, responsive, dark theme. Chapter accent colors via CSS vars.

tasks.title: Create Ch 2.1 paper data (16 papers — Anonymous Credentials)
tasks.description: Create ch21-papers-guide.js (window.CH21_PAPERS) and ch21-papers-technical.js (window.CH21_PAPERS_TECH) with intuitive + technical recaps for all 16 anonymous credential papers. Follow exact data structure from NIGHT_SHIFT_ENRICHED_SPEC.md. Each paper needs: analogy, ASCII diagram, keyPoints, connections, thesisExample, formalDefinition, mathDetails with KaTeX.

tasks.title: Create Ch 2.2 paper data (8 papers — CT, Range Proofs & ZK)
tasks.description: Create ch22-papers-guide.js (window.CH22_PAPERS) and ch22-papers-technical.js (window.CH22_PAPERS_TECH) for all 8 papers. Same structure as T3.

tasks.title: Create Ch 2.3 paper data (10 papers — TEE)
tasks.description: Create ch23-papers-guide.js (window.CH23_PAPERS) and ch23-papers-technical.js (window.CH23_PAPERS_TECH) for all 10 TEE papers. Same structure as T3.

tasks.title: Create Ch 2.4 + 2.5 + 2.6 paper data (10 papers)
tasks.description: Create paper guide+technical JS files for Ch 2.4 (3 papers), Ch 2.5 (4 papers), Ch 2.6 (3 papers). 6 files total: ch24-papers-guide.js, ch24-papers-technical.js, ch25-papers-guide.js, ch25-papers-technical.js, ch26-papers-guide.js, ch26-papers-technical.js.

tasks.title: Update index.html — add script tags + paper section containers
tasks.description: Add <script> tags for all new JS files (12 data files + paper-guide.js) and <link> for paper-cards.css. Add paper section container divs in each chapter tab section. Call renderPaperGuides() in init. Paper sections go BELOW existing study guide sections.

tasks.title: Extend search.js to index papers
tasks.description: Extend buildSearchIndex() in search.js to also index paper data from all CH*_PAPERS globals. Paper entries need: name, authors, keyTakeaway, all keyPoints, analogy, connections, thesisExample, formalDefinition. Search results show paper name + chapter badge. navigateToConcept handles paper results (switch to correct chapter tab, find paper card, expand it, scroll). Add PAPER_GUIDE_ACCESSORS and PAPER_TECHNICAL_ACCESSORS similar to existing DAY_GUIDE_ACCESSORS.

tasks.title: Integration test — build, open, verify all chapters + search
tasks.description: Open index.html in browser, verify: all chapters show paper sections, cards expand, intuitive/technical toggle works, status/relevance badges display, search finds papers (test 'SoK', 'Bulletproofs', 'TEE.Fail', 'Coconut'). Take screenshots.

tasks.title: Final cleanup + PR
tasks.description: Fix any issues from QA, clean up code, create PR.

decisions.decision: Group Ch 2.4+2.5+2.6 into one task (T6) since they only have 10 papers total
decisions.reason: Balances agent workload — T3 (16 papers) and T5 (10 papers) are already heavy

decisions.decision: Paper rendering in separate paper-guide.js, not modifying study-guide.js
decisions.reason: User explicitly asked not to modify existing concept guide files

iteration_log.notes: Wave A+B launched. T1+T2 completed and merged. T3-T6 still running (large data files).
